modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with filing a protection order.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está buscando información sobre cómo presentar una orden de protección. Se siente un poco confundido y no está seguro de los pasos a seguir. Es importante que reciba la ayuda adecuada para poder avanzar con su solicitud.
